text: The software shall provide a cross-platform graphical interface for Open Source archiving and compression utilities.
The software shall support the creation of compressed archives.
The software shall support the updating of existing compressed archives.
The software shall support the extraction of content from compressed archives.
The software shall provide file management tools including robust copy and split and join.
The software shall provide secure deletion of files and folders.
The software shall perform byte to byte comparison between two files.
The software shall calculate checksums and hashes over selected files.
The software shall support two-factor authentication using a password and a keyfile.
The software shall allow users to modify function parameters via a settings menu.
The software shall provide a file manager interface for browsing computer system areas and objects.
The software shall allow object selection based on extension, attributes, size, and date.
The software shall provide a navigation bar with back, forward, up, and refresh buttons.
The software shall include system disk utilities for cleaning, defragmenting, and management.
The software shall provide a system benchmark utility to rate the host system in MIPS.
The software shall support extraction for formats including 7z, RAR, ZIP, TAR, and ISO.
The software shall support archive creation for formats including 7z, ARC, BZ2, GZ, PEA, and ZIP.
The software shall support drag and drop of objects between the computer system and the application interface.
The software shall support dragging objects from the application to the computer system specifically on MS Windows operating systems.
The software shall provide a graphic display of the progress of currently executed functions via PeaLauncher.
The software shall allow the user to change the application language via localization settings.
The software shall require an x-86 compatible CPU for operation.
The software shall be compatible with 64-bit and 32-bit versions of Microsoft Windows.
The software shall be compatible with POSIX-compliant operating systems including Linux and BSD.
The software shall be licensed under the LGPL license.
The software shall function without the installation of additional programs.
The software shall provide help messages to the user in case of data insertion or setting errors.
The software shall prohibit the extraction of encrypted archives without the correct password or keyfile.
The software shall ensure no data remains on the storage area after a secure deletion procedure is completed.
